summary: The diff implements a custom SpiritualCalendar component in DashboardPage.tsx that replaces the shadcn Calendar with a terracotta/cream spiritual aesthetic. The implementation covers most REQ-15 requirements including month navigation, day-of-week labels, date cell styling, today's ring indicator, selected-date terracotta fill, jap-data dot indicators, hover/focus states, and font usage. The existing date-click functionality and timezone-safe date keys are preserved.

hallucinated_features.description: Decorative gradient accent bar added to the calendar
hallucinated_features.reason: The frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions 'a decorative gradient accent bar' in the SpiritualCalendar component, which was not requested in the build requirements.
